title: elmerizzhawiened-pack
description: Elmerizz Pack — a simple and optimized PvP resource pack.Smooth and stylish PvP pack with clean textures.A clean PvP texture pack for Minecraft.
body:
Elmerizz Pack is a clean and smooth PvP resource pack for Minecraft 1.21+.

This pack is designed for players who want a simple and stylish PvP experience with optimized textures and better visibility during gameplay.

Features:
- Clean PvP textures
- Smooth design
- Optimized for Minecraft 1.21+
- Better visibility
- Simple and lightweight pack

Made for Bedwars, Skywars and general PvP gameplay.
